Class FavouritesViewBuilder

java.lang.Object
com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews.FavouritesViewBuilder
public class FavouritesViewBuilder extends Object
Builds the Favourites screen, displaying songs the current user has marked as favourites sorted by the date they were added.

The view supports two display modes controlled by the displayMode parameter passed to build(String):

  • "list" – renders songs in a scrollable ListView
  • any other value – renders songs as an album-art card grid

When the favourites list is empty, an empty-state placeholder is shown instead of the song list.

      public FavouritesViewBuilder(LibraryHandler ctx)

  • Method Details

    • build

      public javafx.scene.layout.VBox build(String displayMode)
      Builds and returns the complete Favourites view.

      Fetches the current user's favourites via LibraryHandler.favouriteService(). On failure an empty list is used so the UI degrades gracefully.

      Parameters:
      displayMode - "list" for a list view, or any other value for a grid view
      Returns:
      a VBox containing the header label and the song list or empty state
